---
title: "expand_thesaurus.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/data/expand_thesaurus.py"
loc: 28
complexity: 7
logic_score: 4.55
style_score: 4.05
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 3.73
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating internal logic. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 9 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [re](file://re)

### Exports
Internal logic only.
